questions.question: Ohm's Law ke according, current (I) ka formula kya hai?

options.B: I = V*R

questions.explanation: Ohm's Law ke anusaar, current (I) voltage (V) ke seedhe anupaati aur resistance (R) ke ulte anupaati hota hai, isliye I = V/R.

questions.question: Automobile electrical circuits mein 'ground' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Battery ke negative terminal se connection

questions.explanation: Automotive circuits mein, ground usually vehicle body ya chassis se connect hota hai, jo battery ke negative terminal se connected hota hai, circuit complete karne ke liye.

questions.question: Agar ek wire mein high resistance hai, toh usmein se current flow kaisa hoga?

options.B: Kam current flow hoga
options.C: Current flow par koi asar nahi padega

questions.explanation: Resistance current ke flow ko rokta hai. Zyada resistance ka matlab hai kam current flow, Ohm's Law (I=V/R) ke anusaar.

questions.question: Multimeter ka use kis liye kiya jata hai?

options.A: Engine oil level check karne ke liye
options.B: Voltage, current aur resistance measure karne ke liye
options.C: Tyre pressure check karne ke liye
options.D: Brake fluid level check karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Multimeter ek versatile tool hai jo electrical circuits mein voltage (volts), current (amperes), aur resistance (ohms) ko measure karne ke kaam aata hai.

questions.question: Electrical circuit mein fuse ka kya role hai?

options.B: Circuit ko overload se bachana

questions.explanation: Fuse ek safety device hai jo excessive current flow hone par melt hokar circuit ko open kar deta hai, jisse components damage hone se bach jaate hain.

questions.question: Current ko kis unit mein measure kiya jata hai?

options.B: Ohms

questions.explanation: Current ko Amperes (A) mein measure kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Ek series circuit mein, total resistance kaise calculate karte hain?

options.B: Individual resistances ko add karke

questions.explanation: Series circuit mein, total resistance sabhi individual resistances ka sum hota hai (R_total = R1 + R2 + ...).

questions.question: Electrical safety ke liye, live wire par kaam karte samay kya pehenna zaroori hai?

options.B: Cotton gloves

questions.explanation: Insulated gloves electricity se protection provide karte hain aur shock lagne se bachate hain.

questions.question: Kisi circuit mein 'short circuit' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Low resistance path jahan current bypass ho jata hai

questions.explanation: Short circuit tab hota hai jab current ek unintended, low-resistance path se flow karta hai, jisse excessive current aur heat generate ho sakti hai.

questions.question: Automotive electrical system mein wires ko protect karne ke liye kya use karte hain?

options.B: Heat shrink tubing ya conduit

questions.explanation: Heat shrink tubing aur electrical conduit wires ko abrasion, heat, aur moisture se protect karte hain.

questions.question: Ek parallel circuit mein, components ke across voltage kaisa hota hai?

options.A: Har component par alag-alag voltage hota hai
options.B: Har component par same voltage hota hai

questions.explanation: Parallel circuit mein, sabhi components ek hi do points ke beech connected hote hain, isliye unke across voltage same rehta hai.

questions.question: Digital multimeter (DMM) se resistance measure karte samay, circuit kaisa hona chahiye?

options.B: Power off hona chahiye

questions.explanation: Resistance measure karte samay, circuit ko de-energized (power off) karna zaroori hai taaki multimeter ko damage na ho aur accurate reading mile.

questions.question: Voltage drop test ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Circuit mein excessive resistance locate karna

questions.explanation: Voltage drop test ek effective method hai jisse circuit mein excessive resistance jaise corroded connections ya damaged wires ko identify kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Agar ek wire ka gauge number kam hai, toh uski thickness aur current carrying capacity kya hogi?

options.B: Zyada thick, kam current

questions.explanation: Wire gauge numbers inverse hote hain. Kam gauge number ka matlab hai mota wire, jo zyada current carry kar sakta hai.

questions.question: Kirchhoff's Current Law (KCL) ke anusaar, ek junction par enter hone wala total current kiske barabar hota hai?

options.B: Us junction se nikalne wale total current ke

questions.explanation: Kirchhoff's Current Law states that at any node (junction) in an electrical circuit, the sum of currents entering the node is equal to the sum of currents leaving the node.

questions.question: Automotive electrical system mein CAN bus ka kya function hai?

options.B: Different ECUs ke beech data communication facilitate karna

questions.explanation: CAN (Controller Area Network) bus ek robust vehicle bus standard hai jo microcontrollers aur devices ko ek dusre se communicate karne deta hai, bina host computer ke.

questions.question: Agar ek circuit mein 12V supply hai aur 4A current flow ho raha hai, toh circuit ki total power consumption (Watts mein) kitni hogi?

options.B: 16 Watts

questions.explanation: Power (P) = Voltage (V) × Current (I). So, P = 12V × 4A = 48 Watts.

questions.question: Automotive battery ka primary function kya hai?

options.B: Engine start karte samay high current provide karna

questions.explanation: Battery ka main kaam starter motor ko power supply karna hai taaki engine start ho sake.

questions.question: Battery ke terminals par white powdery substance (corrosion) ko saaf karne ke liye kya use karna chahiye?

options.B: Water aur baking soda solution

questions.explanation: Baking soda ek mild base hai jo battery corrosion (acidic salts) ko neutralize karta hai, aur water usko rinse out kar deta hai.

questions.question: Alternator ka kya function hai?

options.B: Battery ko charge karna aur electrical system ko power dena jab engine chal raha ho

questions.explanation: Alternator engine ke chalne par mechanical energy ko electrical energy mein convert karta hai, jo battery ko charge karti hai aur vehicle ke electrical components ko power deti hai.

questions.question: Battery ke charge level ko check karne ke liye kaun sa tool use karte hain?

options.B: Hydrometer

questions.explanation: Hydrometer battery electrolyte ki specific gravity measure karta hai, jo battery ke charge level ka indication deta hai.

questions.question: Battery ko jump start karte samay, positive cable ko kahan connect karna chahiye?

options.A: Dead battery ke negative terminal par
options.B: Good battery ke negative terminal par
options.C: Dead battery ke positive terminal par

questions.explanation: Jump starting mein, positive cable hamesha positive terminal se connect hoti hai (good battery ke positive se dead battery ke positive tak).

questions.question: Battery ke 'CCA' rating ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Current Capacity Amperes

questions.explanation: CCA (Cold Cranking Amperes) battery ki capacity ko darshata hai ki woh kitna current deliver kar sakti hai cold temperatures mein engine start karne ke liye.

questions.question: Voltage regulator ka kya kaam hai charging system mein?

options.B: Alternator output voltage ko control karna

questions.explanation: Voltage regulator alternator ke output voltage ko maintain karta hai taaki battery overcharge na ho aur electrical components ko stable voltage mile.

questions.question: Agar alternator belt loose ho, toh kya problem aa sakti hai?

options.B: Power steering failure

questions.explanation: Loose alternator belt slip karegi, jisse alternator theek se ghumega nahi aur battery ko sufficient current se charge nahi kar payega.

questions.question: Ek maintenance-free battery aur conventional battery mein kya difference hai?

options.A: Maintenance-free batteries ko jump start nahi kar sakte
options.B: Maintenance-free batteries mein electrolyte level check aur top-up ki zaroorat nahi hoti
options.C: Conventional batteries zyada powerful hoti hain
options.D: Maintenance-free batteries siraf electric cars mein use hoti hain

questions.explanation: Maintenance-free batteries sealed hoti hain aur unmein water loss minimal hota hai, isliye unmein electrolyte level check karne ya top-up karne ki zaroorat nahi padti.

questions.question: Battery load test ka kya uddeshya hai?

options.B: Battery ki ability ko test karna ki woh high current deliver kar sake
options.C: Battery electrolyte ka color check karna
options.D: Battery ka physical condition check karna

questions.explanation: Load test battery ki capacity ko check karta hai ki woh ek specific load (current) ko ek specific time tak maintain kar sakti hai ya nahi.

questions.question: Agar charging system ka voltage bahut high hai (e.g., 15.5V), toh kya ho sakta hai?

options.B: Battery overcharge hogi aur usse damage ho sakta hai

questions.explanation: Excessively high voltage overcharging ka karan banta hai, jisse battery cells boil ho sakte hain, water loss ho sakta hai aur battery damage ho sakti hai.

questions.question: Jump starting ke samay, last cable connection kahan banana chahiye?

options.B: Good battery ke negative par
options.D: Dead vehicle ke engine block ya unpainted metal surface par

questions.explanation: Last connection dead vehicle ke engine block ya chassis par banaya jata hai, battery se door, taaki spark se hydrogen gas ignite na ho.

questions.question: Ek modern car mein, smart charging system ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Sirf battery ko jaldi charge karta hai
options.B: Fuel efficiency badhata hai aur battery ki life improve karta hai
options.C: AC system ko zyada power deta hai
options.D: Ignition system ko bypass karta hai

questions.explanation: Smart charging systems battery ki exact needs ke according charge regulate karte hain, jisse parasitic load kam hota hai, fuel economy badhti hai, aur battery ki lifespan extend hoti hai.

questions.question: AGM battery ka full form kya hai aur uska kya fayda hai?

options.A: Acid Gel Mixture, sasti hoti hai
options.B: Absorbed Glass Mat, vibration resistant aur leak-proof hoti hai
options.C: Active Grid Module, zyada CCA deti hai
options.D: Automotive Grade Material, recyclable hoti hai

questions.explanation: AGM (Absorbed Glass Mat) batteries mein electrolyte glass mats mein absorb hota hai, jisse woh vibration resistant, leak-proof aur zyada efficient hoti hain.

questions.question: Parasitic drain kya hai aur isse kaise diagnose karte hain?

options.A: Alternator ka excessive output, voltage regulator check karke
options.B: Engine oil ka leakage, visual inspection se
options.C: Battery ka slowly discharge hona jab engine off ho, ammeter se current draw measure karke
options.D: Fuel pump ka malfunction, fuel pressure test se

questions.explanation: Parasitic drain tab hota hai jab engine off hone par bhi koi component battery se current draw karta rehta hai. Isse diagnose karne ke liye battery aur circuit ke beech ammeter connect karke current draw measure karte hain.

questions.question: Alternator mein diode rectifier ka kya kaam hai?

options.A: AC ko DC mein convert karna
options.B: DC ko AC mein convert karna

questions.explanation: Alternator AC current produce karta hai, aur diodes is AC current ko DC current mein convert karte hain, jo vehicle ke electrical system aur battery ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: Agar car ki battery dead ho gayi hai aur jump start ke baad bhi engine start nahi ho raha, toh kya possibility ho sakti hai?

options.B: Alternator kharab hai

questions.explanation: Agar battery charge hone ke baad bhi engine crank nahi ho raha ya bahut slow crank ho raha hai, toh starter motor mein problem ho sakti hai.

questions.question: Starter motor ka main kaam kya hai?

options.B: Engine ko crank karna

questions.explanation: Starter motor ek electric motor hai jo engine ko rotate karta hai (crank karta hai) taaki woh start ho sake.

questions.question: Starter motor ko power kahan se milti hai?

options.B: Fuel pump se

questions.explanation: Starter motor high current draw karta hai, jo directly battery se provide hota hai.

questions.question: Ignition switch ko 'START' position par turn karne par sabse pehle kaun sa component activate hota hai?

options.B: Spark plug

questions.explanation: Ignition switch starter solenoid ko activate karta hai, jo starter motor ko power deta hai aur pinion gear ko flywheel se engage karta hai.

questions.question: Agar starter motor sirf 'click' sound kare lekin engine crank na ho, toh kya possible reason ho sakta hai?

options.B: Battery low ya dead

questions.explanation: Ek click sound aksar starter solenoid ke engage hone ka indication hota hai, lekin agar battery mein sufficient current nahi hai, toh starter motor ghum nahi payega.

questions.question: Starter motor mein Bendix drive ka kya kaam hai?

options.A: Starter motor ko battery se disconnect karna
options.B: Starter pinion gear ko flywheel ring gear se engage aur disengage karna
options.C: Starter motor ki speed control karna

questions.explanation: Bendix drive ya overrunning clutch pinion gear ko flywheel se engage karta hai engine start hone par aur phir disengage kar deta hai taaki starter motor damage na ho.

questions.question: Agar starter motor ghumta hai lekin engine crank nahi hota, toh kya check karna chahiye?

options.B: Spark plugs
options.C: Flywheel ring gear ya starter pinion gear

questions.explanation: Agar starter motor ghum raha hai lekin engine crank nahi ho raha, toh iska matlab hai ki starter pinion gear flywheel ring gear se engage nahi ho pa raha hai ya dono mein se koi damaged hai.

questions.question: Starter solenoid ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Starter motor ko high current supply karna aur pinion gear ko engage karna

questions.explanation: Solenoid ek electromagnetic switch hai jo starter motor ko high current provide karta hai aur uske pinion gear ko forward push karke flywheel se engage karta hai.

questions.question: Neutral safety switch (ya clutch interlock switch) ka kya purpose hai?

options.A: Car ko reverse mein chalane se rokna
options.B: Starter motor ko engage hone se rokna jab transmission park ya neutral mein na ho

questions.explanation: Neutral safety switch ek safety feature hai jo starter motor ko engage hone se rokta hai jab transmission gear mein ho, jisse car accidental movement se bach sake.

questions.question: Starter motor ke brushes ka kya function hai?

options.B: Current ko armature winding tak transmit karna
options.D: Starter motor ki speed control karna

questions.explanation: Brushes carbon se bane hote hain aur stationary field coils se current ko rotating armature winding tak transmit karte hain via the commutator.

questions.question: Agar starter motor continuously chalta rahe engine start hone ke baad bhi, toh kya problem ho sakti hai?

options.B: Faulty ignition switch ya stuck starter solenoid

questions.explanation: Agar starter motor disengage nahi hota, toh ya toh ignition switch start position par stuck hai ya starter solenoid stuck ho gaya hai, jisse motor ko continuously power mil rahi hai.

questions.question: Starter motor circuit mein voltage drop test kahan kiya jata hai?

options.B: Starter motor aur battery ke beech ke cables aur connections par

questions.explanation: Voltage drop test starter circuit mein excessive resistance ko identify karta hai, jo cables, connections, ya solenoid mein ho sakta hai, aur starter ki performance ko affect karta hai.

questions.question: Ek starter motor ka overrunning clutch kya prevent karta hai?

options.A: Starter motor ko overcharge hone se
options.B: Starter motor ko engine ki high RPM se damage hone se

questions.explanation: Overrunning clutch (Bendix drive ka part) starter pinion ko flywheel se disengage kar deta hai jaise hi engine start hota hai aur uski speed starter motor se zyada ho jaati hai, jisse starter motor damage hone se bach jata hai.

questions.question: Permanent magnet starter motor ke kya fayde hain conventional wound-field starter motor ke mukable?

options.B: Zyada current consume karte hain
options.C: Lighter, smaller aur zyada efficient hote hain
options.D: Zyada maintenance ki zaroorat hoti hai

questions.explanation: Permanent magnet starter motors lighter, smaller hote hain aur kam current draw karke bhi achhi performance dete hain, kyunki unhe field windings ko energize karne ki zaroorat nahi padti.

questions.question: Agar starter motor 'whirs' lekin engine crank nahi hota, toh kya issue ho sakta hai?

options.B: Starter motor ka pinion gear ya flywheel ring gear damaged hai

questions.explanation: 'Whirring' sound ka matlab hai starter motor ghum raha hai, lekin engine tak power transmit nahi ho rahi. Iska common reason pinion gear ya flywheel ring gear ka damage hona hai, ya overrunning clutch ka fail hona.

questions.question: Starter motor ke armature ka kya function hai?

options.B: Electrical energy ko mechanical energy mein convert karna

questions.explanation: Armature starter motor ka rotating part hota hai, jismein windings hoti hain. Jab current in windings se flow karta hai aur magnetic field se interact karta hai, toh rotational motion generate hota hai, jo engine ko crank karta hai.

questions.question: Starter motor ke field windings ka kya role hai?

options.B: Magnetic field create karna

questions.explanation: Field windings (ya permanent magnets) starter motor mein stationary magnetic field generate karte hain, jiske saath armature interact karta hai aur torque produce karta hai.

questions.question: Agar starter circuit mein high resistance hai, toh iska kya asar hoga starter motor par?

options.B: Starter motor slow ghumega ya bilkul nahi ghumega
options.C: Starter motor zyada current draw karega

questions.explanation: High resistance (jaise corroded terminals ya loose connections) voltage drop ka karan banta hai, jisse starter motor ko sufficient voltage nahi milta aur woh slow crank karta hai ya bilkul nahi karta.

questions.question: Ignition system ka primary function kya hai?

options.B: Fuel delivery control karna
options.C: Spark plugs ko high voltage spark provide karna

questions.explanation: Ignition system ka kaam hai cylinder ke andar air-fuel mixture ko ignite karne ke liye spark plugs par high voltage spark generate karna.

questions.question: Spark plug ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Cylinder mein air-fuel mixture ko ignite karna

questions.explanation: Spark plug electrical energy ko spark mein convert karta hai jo cylinder mein compressed air-fuel mixture ko ignite karta hai.

questions.question: Ignition coil ka kya function hai?

options.A: Low voltage ko high voltage mein step down karna
options.B: Low voltage ko high voltage mein step up karna

questions.explanation: Ignition coil battery ke relatively low voltage (12V) ko spark plugs ko fire karne ke liye required thousands of volts mein transform karta hai.

questions.question: Modern cars mein 'distributor' ki jagah kaun sa system use hota hai?

options.B: Distributor-less Ignition System (DIS) ya Coil-on-Plug (COP)

questions.explanation: Modern vehicles mein distributor ki jagah DIS ya COP systems use hote hain jo zyada precise timing aur reliability provide karte hain.

questions.question: Engine Control Unit (ECU) ka kya kaam hai?

options.A: Car ka interior light control karna
options.B: Engine ke various functions ko monitor aur control karna

questions.explanation: ECU (Engine Control Unit) car ka 'brain' hai, jo sensors se data lekar fuel injection, ignition timing, idle speed jaise engine functions ko control karta hai.

questions.question: Mass Air Flow (MAF) sensor ka kya function hai?

options.B: Engine mein enter hone wali air ki quantity measure karna

questions.explanation: MAF sensor engine mein enter hone wali air ki mass flow rate ko measure karta hai, jo ECU ko fuel injection calculate karne mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Oxygen (O2) sensor ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Exhaust gases mein oxygen content measure karna

questions.explanation: Oxygen sensor exhaust gases mein oxygen level ko monitor karta hai, jisse ECU air-fuel mixture ko optimize karta hai for better combustion aur emission control.

questions.question: Agar spark plug gap galat ho, toh engine performance par kya asar padega?

options.B: Engine misfire kar sakta hai ya rough idle ho sakta hai

questions.explanation: Incorrect spark plug gap weak spark ya no spark ka karan ban sakta hai, jisse incomplete combustion, misfires, aur poor engine performance hoti hai.

questions.question: Crankshaft Position Sensor (CKP) ka kya role hai?

options.B: Crankshaft ki rotational speed aur position ko monitor karna

questions.explanation: CKP sensor ECU ko engine ki RPM aur piston ki position ke baare mein inform karta hai, jo ignition timing aur fuel injection ke liye crucial hai.

questions.question: Ignition timing advanced hone ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Spark bahut der se hota hai
options.C: Spark plug gap bahut zyada hai
options.D: Spark plug gap bahut kam hai

questions.explanation: Advanced ignition timing ka matlab hai spark top dead center (TDC) se pehle hota hai. Isse power badh sakti hai lekin excessive advance pre-ignition ya 'pinging' ka karan ban sakta hai.

questions.question: Knock sensor ka kya kaam hai?

options.A: Engine mein noise level measure karna
options.B: Engine mein abnormal combustion (knocking/pinging) detect karna
options.D: Exhaust system mein blockage detect karna

questions.explanation: Knock sensor engine block par mount hota hai aur vibrations ko detect karta hai jo pre-ignition ya detonation (knocking) se hote hain. ECU phir ignition timing ko retard karke isse correct karta hai.

questions.question: Coil-on-Plug (COP) ignition system ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Har spark plug ke liye separate ignition coil hoti hai, jisse zyada efficient spark milta hai
options.C: Zyada wiring ki zaroorat hoti hai
options.D: Spark plugs ko manually adjust karna padta hai

questions.explanation: COP system mein har cylinder ke liye ek individual ignition coil hoti hai, jo spark plug ke upar direct mount hoti hai. Isse high voltage loss kam hota hai aur zyada precise spark delivery hoti hai.

questions.question: Camshaft Position Sensor (CMP) ka kya role hai?

options.B: Camshaft ki rotational position monitor karna, jo valve timing ke liye important hai

questions.explanation: CMP sensor ECU ko crankshaft position ke relative mein camshaft ki position batata hai, jo ECU ko fuel injection aur ignition timing ko precisely control karne mein help karta hai, especially for sequential fuel injection.

questions.question: Agar ECU mein 'Check Engine Light' (CEL) illuminate ho raha hai, toh pehla step kya hona chahiye?

options.B: Diagnostic Trouble Codes (DTCs) ko scan karna

questions.explanation: CEL ka matlab hai ECU ne koi malfunction detect kiya hai. Diagnostic scanner se DTCs ko read karke specific problem ka pata lagaya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Variable Valve Timing (VVT) system ka electrical component kya control karta hai?

options.B: Spark plug gap
options.C: Camshaft position, jisse valve opening aur closing timing adjust hoti hai

questions.explanation: VVT system engine performance aur fuel efficiency ko optimize karne ke liye camshaft ki relative position ko adjust karta hai, jisse intake aur exhaust valves ke opening/closing timing change hote hain. Iska control ECU electrical solenoids ke through karta hai.

questions.question: Glow plugs ka use kis type ke engine mein hota hai aur kyun?

options.A: Petrol engines mein spark generate karne ke liye
options.B: Diesel engines mein cold start ke liye combustion chamber ko pre-heat karne ke liye
options.C: Electric vehicles mein battery charging ke liye
options.D: Hybrid engines mein auxiliary power ke liye

questions.explanation: Glow plugs diesel engines mein use hote hain. Ye fuel ko ignite karne ke liye compression heat par rely karte hain, aur cold weather mein engine start karne ke liye combustion chamber ko pre-heat karna zaroori hota hai.

questions.question: Agar car misfire kar rahi hai aur CEL blink kar rahi hai, toh kya immediate action lena chahiye?

options.B: Car ko rok kar engine off karna chahiye aur mechanic se contact karna chahiye

questions.explanation: Blinking CEL severe misfire indicate karta hai jo catalytic converter ko damage kar sakta hai. Aise mein vehicle ko immediately rok kar engine off karna aur repair karwana zaroori hai.

questions.question: Headlights ke dim hone ka common reason kya ho sakta hai?

options.B: Battery low ya charging system mein problem hai

questions.explanation: Dim headlights low battery voltage ya charging system (alternator/voltage regulator) mein problem ka indication hai, jisse lights ko sufficient power nahi mil rahi.

questions.question: Turn signal (indicator) blink nahi kar raha, toh kya check karna chahiye sabse pehle?

options.B: Flasher relay ya fuse

questions.explanation: Turn signals ka blink na karna aksar faulty flasher relay, blown fuse, ya damaged bulb ka karan hota hai.

questions.question: Car horn baj nahi raha, toh kya check karna chahiye?

options.B: Horn fuse, relay aur connections

questions.explanation: Horn ke kaam na karne par, sabse pehle uska fuse, relay, wiring connections, aur khud horn unit ko check kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Power window kaam nahi kar rahi, toh kya possible reason ho sakta hai?

options.B: Blown fuse, faulty switch ya motor

questions.explanation: Power window failure ke common reasons mein blown fuse, faulty window switch, ya power window motor ka kharab hona shamil hai.

questions.question: Automotive wiring harness ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Wiring ko organize, protect aur install karna aasaan banana

questions.explanation: Wiring harness wires ko ek bundle mein organize karta hai, unhe physical damage se bachata hai, aur vehicle mein installation ko simplify karta hai.

questions.question: Dome light (cabin light) ke fuse ko replace karte samay kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.A: Kisi bhi fuse se replace kar dena chahiye
options.B: Same amperage rating ke fuse se replace karna chahiye
options.C: High amperage rating ke fuse se replace karna chahiye
options.D: Fuse ko wire se bypass kar dena chahiye

questions.explanation: Fuse ko hamesha same amperage rating ke fuse se replace karna chahiye. Incorrect fuse use karne se components damage ho sakte hain ya fire hazard ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Relay ka kya function hai automotive circuit mein?

options.B: Small electrical current se high current circuit ko control karna

questions.explanation: Relay ek electromagnetic switch hai jo ek low-current control signal (jaise ignition switch se) ka use karke high-current circuit (jaise starter motor ya headlights) ko switch karta hai.

questions.question: LED lights ke kya fayde hain halogen lights ke mukable?

options.B: Kam energy consume karte hain aur zyada long-lasting hote hain
options.C: Zyada expensive hote hain aur jaldi kharab hote hain

questions.explanation: LEDs (Light Emitting Diodes) halogen bulbs ke mukable bahut kam energy use karte hain, zyada bright hote hain, aur unki lifespan bahut zyada hoti hai.

questions.question: Agar ek headlight bulb baar-baar fuse blow kar raha hai, toh kya possible reason ho sakta hai?

options.B: Wire mein short circuit ya overcurrent hai

questions.explanation: Baar-baar fuse blow hona indicate karta hai ki circuit mein excessive current flow ho raha hai, jo aksar short circuit ya wire damage ke karan hota hai.

questions.question: Power mirrors kaam nahi kar rahe, toh kya troubleshooting steps honge?

options.B: Fuse box check karna, wiring aur mirror switch ko test karna

questions.explanation: Power mirror failure mein fuse, wiring connections, mirror switch, aur mirror motor ko test karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Trailer wiring harness install karte samay kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.A: Kisi bhi wire se connect kar dena chahiye
options.B: Properly insulated aur weatherproof connections banane chahiye
options.C: Wiring ko loose chhod dena chahiye
options.D: Sirf positive wires connect karne chahiye

questions.explanation: Trailer wiring weather aur road conditions ke contact mein aata hai, isliye properly insulated aur weatherproof connections banana corrosion aur short circuits se bachne ke liye crucial hai.

questions.question: CAN bus system mein ek faulty module ka kya asar ho sakta hai?

options.A: Sirf us module ka function affect hoga
options.B: Poore CAN bus network ka communication disrupt ho sakta hai

questions.explanation: CAN bus ek network hai. Agar ek module theek se kaam nahi karta ya short circuit ho jata hai, toh woh poore network ke communication ko block ya disrupt kar sakta hai, jisse multiple systems fail ho sakte hain.

questions.question: Automotive electrical connectors ko waterproof banane ke liye kya use karte hain?

options.B: Dielectric grease aur heat shrink tubing

questions.explanation: Dielectric grease electrical connections ko moisture aur corrosion se bachata hai, aur heat shrink tubing ek tight seal provide karta hai.

questions.question: Agar ek car mein aftermarket accessories install kiye gaye hain aur battery jaldi discharge ho rahi hai, toh kya check karna chahiye?

options.B: Parasitic drain, especially from aftermarket accessories

questions.explanation: Aftermarket accessories often parasitic drains ka karan bante hain agar woh theek se wire na kiye gaye hon, jisse battery jaldi discharge ho sakti hai.

questions.question: Dashboard lights dim ya flicker kar rahi hain, kya reason ho sakta hai?

options.B: Loose battery terminal, faulty ground connection, ya charging system issue

questions.explanation: Dim ya flickering lights electrical system mein voltage instability ka sign hai, jo loose connections, poor grounds, ya charging system ki problem se ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Reverse lights kaam nahi kar rahi, toh kya check karna chahiye?

options.B: Reverse light fuse, bulbs, aur reverse light switch (transmission par)

questions.explanation: Reverse lights ke kaam na karne par, related fuse, bulbs, aur transmission par located reverse light switch ko check kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Diagnostic Trouble Codes (DTCs) ko read karne ke liye kaun sa tool use hota hai?

options.B: OBD-II scanner

questions.explanation: OBD-II (On-Board Diagnostics II) scanner vehicle ke ECU se connect hokar diagnostic trouble codes ko read karta hai, jo system malfunctions ko identify karte hain.

questions.question: Agar car start nahi ho rahi aur koi click sound nahi aa rahi, toh kya possible reason ho sakta hai?

options.B: Ignition switch, starter relay, ya starter motor mein problem hai

questions.explanation: Agar koi click sound nahi hai, toh power starter motor tak nahi pahunch rahi. Iska matlab ignition switch, starter relay, fuse, ya wiring mein problem ho sakti hai.

questions.question: Voltage drop test karne ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Circuit mein high resistance ya poor connections ko pinpoint karna

questions.explanation: Voltage drop test component par nahi, balki wire ya connection par kiya jata hai. Agar drop zyada hai, toh wahan resistance hai.

questions.question: Agar ek circuit mein fuse baar-baar blow ho raha hai, toh kya problem ho sakti hai?

options.B: Short circuit ya overcurrent

questions.explanation: Fuse baar-baar blow hone ka matlab hai ki circuit mein consistently rated current se zyada current flow ho raha hai, jo short circuit ka indication hai.

questions.question: Parasitic drain test karne ke liye kaun sa tool use karte hain?

options.B: Ammeter

questions.explanation: Parasitic drain test mein battery aur circuit ke beech series mein ammeter connect karke current draw measure kiya jata hai jab engine off ho.

questions.question: Scan tool par 'P0301' DTC ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Cylinder 1 Misfire Detected

questions.explanation: P0301 ek generic OBD-II code hai jo 'Cylinder 1 Misfire Detected' ko indicate karta hai. P030x series misfires ke liye hoti hai, jahan 'x' cylinder number hai.

questions.question: Agar alternator output voltage bahut kam hai (e.g., 12.5V engine running par), toh kya check karna chahiye?

options.B: Alternator belt tension, connections, aur alternator unit

questions.explanation: Low alternator output voltage ka matlab hai ki alternator theek se charge nahi kar raha. Iske liye belt tension, wiring connections, aur alternator ki internal health check karni chahiye.

questions.question: Poor ground connection ka electrical system par kya asar hota hai?

options.B: Components ko intermittent power milti hai ya woh kaam nahi karte

questions.explanation: Poor ground connection circuit mein high resistance create karta hai, jisse components ko sufficient voltage nahi milta aur woh theek se kaam nahi karte ya bilkul nahi karte.

questions.question: Intermittent electrical fault ko diagnose karna kyun mushkil hota hai?

options.A: Woh hamesha engine off hone par hi hote hain
options.B: Woh sirf kabhi-kabhi ya specific conditions mein occur hote hain
options.C: Unka koi DTC generate nahi hota
options.D: Woh siraf visual inspection se detect ho jaate hain

questions.explanation: Intermittent faults irregular hote hain aur specific vibrations, temperature, ya load conditions mein hi appear hote hain, jisse unhe diagnose karna challenging ho jata hai.

questions.question: Wiring diagram ka use troubleshooting mein kaise help karta hai?

options.B: Components ke locations aur unke electrical connections ko samajhne mein help karta hai

questions.explanation: Wiring diagrams circuit path, component location, wire colors, aur connections ko visualize karne mein help karte hain, jo fault finding ke liye essential hai.

questions.question: Agar ek car ka ECU communication lost ho gaya hai, toh kya check karna chahiye?

options.B: ECU fuses, power supply, ground connections aur CAN bus lines

questions.explanation: ECU communication loss ek serious issue hai. Iske liye ECU ke power, ground, aur CAN bus connections ko meticulously check karna chahiye.

questions.question: Oscilloscope ka use automotive diagnostics mein kya detect karne ke liye kiya jata hai?

options.B: Dynamic electrical signals (waveforms) jaise sensor outputs ya ignition patterns

questions.explanation: Oscilloscope real-time mein electrical signals (waveforms) ko display karta hai, jo intermittent faults, sensor glitches, ya ignition system ke timing issues ko diagnose karne mein invaluable hai.

questions.question: Ammeter clamp (current clamp) ka kya fayda hai parasitic drain test mein?

options.A: Circuit ko break kiye bina current measure karna
options.B: Voltage measure karna

questions.explanation: Ammeter clamp circuit ko disconnect kiye bina wire ke around current measure karta hai, jisse ECU ya other modules ki memory reset nahi hoti during parasitic drain test.

questions.question: Agar car mein 'no start' condition hai aur starter motor ghum raha hai lekin engine fire nahi kar raha, toh kya troubleshoot karna chahiye?

options.B: Fuel system (fuel pump, injectors) aur Ignition system (spark, coils)

questions.explanation: Agar engine crank ho raha hai lekin start nahi ho raha, toh iska matlab hai ki fuel, spark, ya compression mein se koi ek missing hai. Fuel aur ignition systems ko check karna priority hai.

questions.question: Check Engine Light (CEL) reset karne ke baad agar woh phir se aa jaye, toh iska kya matlab hai?

options.B: Underlying problem abhi bhi मौजूद hai aur usse fix karna zaroori hai
options.D: Engine ko tune-up ki zaroorat hai

questions.explanation: CEL reset karne se sirf light off hoti hai, problem fix nahi hoti. Agar underlying fault condition abhi bhi मौजूद hai, toh ECU use detect karke CEL ko phir se illuminate kar dega.

questions.question: Agar ek car mein multiple electrical systems mein random faults aa rahe hain, toh kya common root cause ho sakta hai?

options.B: Faulty ground connections ya poor battery connections

questions.explanation: Poor ground connections ya loose battery terminals poore vehicle ke electrical system mein voltage fluctuations aur random malfunctions ka karan ban sakte hain, kyunki sabhi circuits ko stable power aur return path ki zaroorat hoti hai.
